children.source_sentence: In FY2023, Keppel Ltd reduced Scope 1 and Scope 2 carbon emissions intensity.

claims.text: Keppel has achieved an 87.6% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions compared to their 2020 baseline.
claims.source_sentence: As at end-2025, we have achieved an 87.6% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions compared to our 2020 baseline and are on track to meet our target of achieving net zero Scope 1 and 2 emissions well ahead of 2050.

claims.text: Keppel’s Scope 3 emissions in 2025 amounted to about 6.7 million tCO2e.
claims.source_sentence: Our Scope 3 emissions in 2025 amounted to about 6.7 million tCO2e, which was higher than 2024, mainly due to higher gas sales and one-off accounting for the divestment of an office complex in India.

claims.text: Keppel contributed 1.12 million tCO2e in avoided emissions from various projects in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: In 2025, we contributed 1.12 million tCO2e in avoided emissions from various Keppel projects, including the waste-to-energy plant that we operate in Qatar, and the upgrade of the Keppel Merlimau Cogen Plant in Singapore.

claims.text: Keppel reduced water withdrawal and waste generation in absolute and intensity terms compared to the 2023 base year.
claims.source_sentence: Beyond carbon emissions, Keppel also reduced our water withdrawal and waste generation, both in absolute and intensity terms, compared to the 2023 base year.

claims.text: Keppel achieved zero fatalities across their operations in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: Reflecting Keppel’s focus on safety, we achieved zero fatalities across our operations in 2025.
